visa_types.name: Visa to attend Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/svk/travel-insurance)
Short stay visas (Schengen)
Please click here for the Short Stay Visa checklist.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > are > en > Table:Visa to attend Conference > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in AED is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service charge of AED 172.40 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time is within 15 calendar days minimum from the day of submission, the period may extend up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.
visa_types.forms:
Please click here to download the Visa Application Form
Schengen C visa form - EN
Schengen C visa form - SK
visa_types.overview:
Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents. 

## Visa Fees

[svk > are > en > Table:Visa to attend Conference > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in AED is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be charged a service charge of AED 172.40 per application in addition to the visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/svk/travel-insurance)
Short stay visas (Schengen)
Please click here for the Short Stay Visa checklist.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent passport sized photographs (3x3.5 cm) as per specifications.
Click here to view a sample biometric photo
Requirements:
- NEW! Should NOT be older than 6 months
- A frontal view of the face covering 70-80% (32-26mm) of the photo
- A uniform and white-colored background
- Clear facial features and eyes – not covered by hair or glasses frame
- Head coverings are only accepted for religious reasons
- Do not glue or staple the pictures to the application form

## Processing Time
The processing time is within 15 calendar days minimum from the day of submission, the period may extend up to a maximum of 30 calendar days in individual cases.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences.

## Download Forms
Please click here to download the Visa Application Form
Schengen C visa form - EN
Schengen C visa form - SK

visa_types.name: National Visa – Employment
visa_types.documents_required: For information on the documents required please click here.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > are > en > Table:National Visa – Employment  > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 30 Euros (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
National D visa form - EN
National D visa form - SK
Form for temporary residence SK EN
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/visa-and-services/national-visa/employment).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/visa-and-services/national-visa/employment).

## Visa Fees

[svk > are > en > Table:National Visa – Employment  > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 30 Euros (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
For information on the documents required please click here.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
National D visa form - EN
National D visa form - SK
Form for temporary residence SK EN
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
